meaning: adj.根本的,基本的,激进的n.激进分子
examples: It was a radical departure from tradition.
A radical overhaul of the tax system is necessary.
Such a radical proposal would never get through Congress.
Such acts led the political establishment to unfairly label Romero as a revolutionary and a radical.
Expertly cited numerous research studies, sensible conclusions (though radical to our culture)balanced and fair reporting.
